@documentation.@comment: A captured document — quick-capture text note, audio recording, or arbitrary binary blob. Written before processing, later refined or promoted into domain documents. The ``@metadata.label_field`` is ``"content"``, which may be null for binary-only captures (e.g. audio). Consumers MUST fall back to ``file_name`` then ``@id`` when the label field is null.

Processing lifecycle of a captured document. Spans text and audio lifecycles: new (fresh capture), transcribed (audio→text complete), processed (promoted to domain documents), failed (processing error), archived (soft-retired).
